properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want a heart that forgives, a heart full of love One with compassion just like yours above One that overcomes evil with goodness and love Like it never happened, never holding a grudge

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want a heart that forgives that lives and let's live One that keeps loving over and over again One that men can't offend because your word is within One that loves without price like you lord Jesus Christ

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want a heart that loves everybody even my enemies I want to love you like you, be like you, just like you did I want a heart that forgives

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Want a heart that forgives when the ones that are closest That I've known the longest hurt me the most I still wanna love them jus like you loved me even though I'm hurting

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I want a heart that forgives when the pain is so deep It's so hard to speak about it, to anyone just like your son I give up my right to hold it against them with hatred inside

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I want a heart that loves everybody even my enemies I wanna walk like you, live like you, just like you did Coz the heart that forgives is the heart that will live Totally free from the pain of the past And the heart that let's go Is the heart that will know so much freedom

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Lord I wanna let it go God I need to let it go God its been holding me back And I don't want it. I don't, I don't want it no more I don't know exactly what to do to get rid of it Here I am oh, here I am lord Jesus Lord I need you, I know this is me that you're talking to This is me, this is me, this is me Lord this is me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord I'll let it go, every person, thats ever hurt me Gonna let it go, every single hurt I gonna let it go, every single pain, gonna let it go I let it go, (Lord you can have it) You can have it now Cause I don't want it no more
